# EzyHelpers

> Trusted and verified house help service in India. We connect families with background-checked domestic helpers including maids, nannies, cooks, drivers, elderly caregivers, and more.

## About
EzyHelpers is India's trusted platform for hiring verified domestic helpers. We serve cities including Bangalore and Bareilly, offering full-time maids, part-time maids, live-in maids, nannies, babysitters, cooks, drivers, elderly care, gardeners, and various home services.

## Services
- Full-Time Maids
- Part-Time Maids
- Live-In Maids
- Nanny & Babysitter
- Cooks
- Drivers
- Elderly Care
- On-Demand Helpers
- Home Deep Cleaning
- Appliance Repair
- Pest Control
- House Shifting

## Cities Served
- Bangalore
- Bareilly

## Contact
- Website: https://www.ezyhelpers.com
- Phone: Available on website
